list.expr: label_replace(max without(uid, instance) (kube_pod_start_time{pod=~"shards-.*", namespace="default"}) != max without(uid, instance) (kube_pod_start_time{pod=~"shards-.*", namespace="default"} offset 5m), "validator", "$1.testnet-conway.linera.net", "cluster", "gke-testnet-conway-(validator-\d+)")
list.name: shard_restart
